message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
autonumber

participant "uic : UIController" as uic
participant "ExtensionManager" as em
participant "extension : NetworkWorkbookSearchExtension" as ext
participant "uiExtension : UIExtensionNetworkWorkbookSearch" as uiExt
participant "NetworkWorkbookSearchPanel : JPanel" as panel

uic -> em: extensions=getExtensions()

loop [for Extension ext : extensions]
  uic -> em: uiExtension=getUIExtension(this)
  activate em
  em -> ext: new(extension, uic)
  activate ext
  ext -> uiExt: getSidebar()
  activate uiExt
  uiExt -> panel: new (uic)
  activate panel
  panel --> uiExt
  deactivate panel
  deactivate uiExt
  deactivate ext
  deactivate em
  uic --> uic: uiExtensions.add(uiExtension)
endloop

@enduml
